description: AutoStream provides automated video editing tools for content creators, powered by AI.

policies.refund: No refunds after 7 days of purchase.
policies.support: 24/7 support is available only on the Pro plan. Basic plan users get email support.
policies.trial: We offer a 7-day free trial on both plans.
policies.cancellation: You can cancel your subscription at any time. Access continues until the end of the billing period.

faqs.question: What platforms does AutoStream support?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter/X, and Facebook for direct publishing.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade from Basic to Pro?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can upgrade at any time. The price difference will be prorated for the remaining days in your billing cycle.

faqs.question: Does AutoStream support team collaboration?
faqs.answer: Team collaboration is available on the Pro plan, allowing up to 5 team members.

faqs.question: What AI features are included?
faqs.answer: The Pro plan includes AI captions, auto-highlight detection, smart trimming, and background noise removal.
